title: S&P Analyst Sees Paramount Rating as Strained After Warner Deal
description: Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $111 billion bid for Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. will strain its credit rating, an S&P Global Ratings analyst said, even if the combined company could ultimately cut its debt levels over time.
content: Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $111 billion bid for Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. will strain its credit rating, an S&P Global Ratings analyst said, even if the combined company could ultimately cut its debt levels over time.
